screenshot_context: Desktop 1280x800: Bloberto HQ, vibe '🔥 Crushing It', Sofia as sole active worker in error state ('bugs have nowhere to hide' speech bubble, desk__nameplate--error in red), Carlos/Maya/Dave/Luna as ghost roster members at dark desks, one vacant desk with job card (hidden until hover — correct). Office window ambient visible at right edge with orange sunrise gradient; time-caption 'SUNRISE' clipped by overflow:hidden to read 'UNRISE'. Bloberto title 'CVO'. COFFEE TRIPLE SHOT corner intact. Shortcut toast visible bottom-right. Mobile 375x812: Tab labels '🏢 Office' and '📊 Dashboard' BOTH FULLY VISIBLE — tab clipping regression from #36 is FIXED. Office grid compressed but functional. Footer visible below the fold. Polling paused pill not present (idle state). Puppeteer a11y audit: 0 images without alt, 0 unlabeled buttons — BUT role=radio audit returned 0 because Dashboard panel is not rendered when Office tab is active (conditional rendering conceals the bug from automated audits).
fixed_since_last_review: Mobile tab label '🏢 Office' was clipped to '🏢 Offic' at 375px — now fully visible (Puppeteer confirmed: right=118px, windowWidth=375px, clipped=false). Dashboard tab also renders fully at right=259px.

suggestions.title: role='radio' on <button> elements is invalid ARIA
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.jsx lines 1289, 1300, 1310: filter bar buttons carry `role='radio'` inside `role='radiogroup'` parents. ARIA spec prohibits role='radio' on interactive elements. Puppeteer returned radioRoleCount=0 only because the Dashboard panel uses conditional rendering (`tab === 'office' ? ... : ...`) and the Office tab is default — the broken markup is hidden from automated audits at page load. Switch to a real Dashboard tab to verify: role='radio' on <button> is still live in production. Fix A: Replace with <input type='radio'> styled as buttons. Fix B: remove role='radio' + aria-checked, change parent to role='group', add aria-pressed to each button. Six line change.

suggestions.title: Ghost characters are focusable (tabIndex=0) but have no keyboard interaction
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. Office.jsx line 682: Character always renders tabIndex={0} regardless of variant. Ghost roster characters have no onClick and no role='button' — yet they consume a tab stop. A keyboard user tabbing through the office floor lands on five dead focusable ghosts. Fix: set tabIndex={-1} on ghost characters, or add a keyboard handler that reveals the ghost's OOO bubble on Enter/Space. Either way, remove the wasted tab stop.

suggestions.title: completionToast state uses two incompatible shapes — silent 'undefined shipped it!' risk
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.jsx line 1111: `completionToast.text ? completionToast.text : '🎉 ${completionToast.name} shipped it!'` — two different call sites set the toast with different shapes ({ name, color } vs { text, type: 'info' }). If shapes diverge or a future change sets the wrong path, the toast renders '🎉 undefined shipped it!' with no console error. Fix: normalize to { message: string, color?: string } and update both call sites.

suggestions.title: Plant toast and completion toast render at identical screen coordinates
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. Both Office.jsx plantToast (lines 1207-1219) and App.jsx completionToast (lines 1093-1105) use `position: fixed; bottom: 2rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); zIndex: 9999`. When a worker ships at the same time the ficus levels up, the toasts completely overlap. Fix: stagger vertically (plantToast at bottom: 5.5rem) or queue them through a shared toast manager.

suggestions.title: 'After Hours' vibe is unreachable when any worker is active
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. utils/vibe.js: getTeamVibe() only returns 'after-hours' when workers.length === 0. At 2am with Sofia solo-grinding, the vibe is '🔥 Crushing It' and the honorific correctly shows 'night owl 🌙' (App.jsx line 1123 uses isAfterHours override), but the vibe KEY stays 'crushing' — meaning Bloberto's title is 'CVO', the weather label is wrong, and VACANT_ADS shows 'Staff Wizard' instead of 'Night Watch'. The greeting and the vibe system are out of sync. Fix: in getTeamVibe(), return 'after-hours' when hour >= 22 || hour < 6, regardless of worker count.

suggestions.title: useTimeTick at App root re-renders entire tree every 60 seconds
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.jsx line 640: useTimeTick(60_000) triggers full re-render of office floor, all desks, all characters, StatsBar, all WorkerCards, and ActivityLog every minute — even when zero data changed. The sole purpose is keeping '5m ago' timestamps fresh. Fix: remove call from App root, move into ActivityLogEntry and WorkerCard leaf components only. Both are already memo-wrapped.

suggestions.title: Keyboard tab-switch does not move focus to the new panel
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.jsx handleTabKeyDown (lines 739-749): pressing ArrowRight/ArrowLeft switches the active tab but does not call focus() on the new panel. Puppeteer confirmed tabpanel elements have tabIndex=null. The ARIA tabpanel pattern requires focus to move to the panel container or its first focusable child on keyboard-triggered switch. Fix: give each tabpanel tabIndex={-1} and add `document.getElementById('tabpanel-dashboard')?.focus()` after setTab('dashboard') in the handler.

suggestions.title: Activity log filter shows blank area when filter yields zero results
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.jsx ActivityLog component line 145: the 'No activity yet…' guard fires only when the passed entries array is empty. The external filter state (activityFilter, activityWorkerFilter) reduces entries to zero when no matching events exist, and ActivityLog renders a silent blank div rather than a contextual message. Fix: detect displayed.length === 0 after reversing and render 'No errors logged recently' or '😶 Nothing here for this worker' based on the active filter.

suggestions.title: No stale-data fallback — offline page load shows empty office
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. localStorage usage in App.jsx is limited to theme, vibe streak, shortcut visibility, and vibe history. Worker and activity arrays are never cached. Offline load = empty office with error banner. Fix: after each successful fetch, write workers and activity to localStorage (bloberto-workers-cache, bloberto-activity-cache). On load, hydrate state from cache before first fetch and show a 'Showing cached data' badge if the live fetch fails.

suggestions.title: App.jsx is a 1350-line god component — extract at minimum 4 custom hooks
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.jsx line count unchanged at 1350. It owns: data fetching, polling, worker cinematic entry/exit diffing, vibe streak + confetti, favicon updates, tab title cycling, toast management, keyboard shortcuts, activity filtering, tag filtering, AND the full render tree. Office.jsx is 1552 lines. Extract at minimum: useWorkerSync(), useVibeTracking(vibeKey), useDynamicFavicon(workers, fetchError), useTabTitle(workers, vibe). Primary blocker for testability.

suggestions.title: Worker card flip button (ℹ️) tap target too small and unlabeled on mobile
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.css .worker-card__info-btn (line 533): padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem with font-size: 0.85rem. Rendered tap target is well below WCAG 2.5.5's 44×44px minimum. No min-width/min-height on mobile. Fix: add min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px on .worker-card__info-btn at ≤640px breakpoint, and add a visible 'History' text label next to the icon on mobile.

suggestions.title: Office window time-caption 'SUNRISE' clipped to 'UNRISE' by overflow:hidden
suggestions.description: NEW in #37. Office.css .office-window is 7% wide with overflow:hidden. The .office-window__time-caption uses white-space:nowrap and font-size:0.38rem centered via left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%). At 7% of floor width (roughly 26–62px depending on viewport), the word 'sunrise' (7 chars) overflows both sides and the leading 'S' is cropped by overflow:hidden, rendering 'UNRISE' in the bottom of the window on both desktop and mobile screenshots. Fix: either reduce the caption to an emoji (🌅) or truncate-ellipsis with overflow:hidden + text-overflow:ellipsis on the caption itself rather than relying on the parent clip.

suggestions.title: Light mode office floor grid disappears — opacity 0.05 is too faint
suggestions.description: Still unfixed (cannot verify in screenshot — dark mode was active). Office.css sets --grid-line: rgba(0,0,0,0.05) in [data-theme='light']. At this opacity the grid lines are visually invisible on the light background. Fix: increase to rgba(0,0,0,0.09) or add a tint like rgba(80,80,200,0.07) to maintain the cool-blue palette.

suggestions.title: EmptyState renders 🌙 emoji twice in three lines of JSX
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.jsx lines 522–525: 🌙 followed immediately by 'The office is quiet... for now 🌙'. Same emoji appears twice in the same tiny component. When the Dashboard has no active workers, this is the only content visible — looks like a copy-paste artifact. Fix: remove the trailing 🌙 or replace it with 😴 or 🛌.

suggestions.title: Vibe sparkline legend is hover-only — invisible on touch devices
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.css line 1144: .sparkline-legend only appears via .stat-card:hover. Touch users never see the legend for the colored vibe history dots. Fix: render the legend at opacity:0.7 always and increase to 1 on hover. The pills are tiny — the always-visible version adds negligible height.

suggestions.title: Polling-paused pill shows 'move mouse to refresh' on touch devices
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.css line 1012: .polling-paused-pill has no @media (pointer: coarse) rule. The text 'Paused · move mouse to refresh' is meaningless on mobile — there is no mouse. The shortcut-toast correctly uses @media (pointer: coarse) { display: none } at line 1116 but this fix was never applied to the pill. Fix: add @media (pointer: coarse) { .polling-paused-pill { display: none; } }.

suggestions.title: Office tab has no status indicator while user is on Dashboard tab
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. App.jsx lines 1171–1193: the Office tab button renders only '🏢 Office' with no status badge. The Dashboard tab receives the error count badge (tab-error-badge) at line 1196. If a worker enters error state while the user is on Dashboard, there is no visual cue to switch to Office. Fix: mirror the Dashboard badge logic — add a colored dot to the Office tab: green when all working, amber when any idle, red when any in error.

suggestions.title: ERROR_BUBBLE_MESSAGES and WORKER_ERROR_BUBBLES declared inside component body
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. Office.jsx lines 510, 526–537: IDLE_BUBBLE_EMOJIS, ERROR_BUBBLE_MESSAGES, and WORKER_ERROR_BUBBLES are declared inside the Character component function body (not inside a useEffect, but at the top level of the component). A new array and a new object are allocated on every render of every Character. Move all three to module scope — they have zero dependency on props or state.

suggestions.title: Footer quote counter '1/9' has no label — reads like a version number
suggestions.description: Still unfixed. The footer shows a counter like '1/9' at font-size:0.7em; opacity:0.55 next to the tagline. Without context it reads as a version identifier. The ✦ sparkle has no aria-label. Fix: add title='Quote 1 of 9 — click ✦ to cycle' to the counter span and aria-label='Cycle tagline quotes' to the ✦ trigger.
